column2:
Terminal Commands ThinkWiFi Venue Router Config Script-v2026.02
0) Ensure the Unjani Mikrotik Router is factory reset with no default configuration
1) Enter the required Site Name, Router's Ether1 MAC address & CircleTEl PPPOE details in the Grey cells on left in Column A (Rows in Pink will update automatically)
2) Select rows B2:B125, copy & paste into the Mikrotik terminal
/interface pppoe-client add add-default-route=yes disabled=no interface=ether1-www name=CIRCLETEL-PPPOE password=CT-UNJ-015 user=CT-UNJ-015@circletel.co.za
/interface l2tp-client add connect-to=34.35.85.28 name=L2TP-THINK-JHBGC-CORE1 password=PP!PAcc3ss disabled=no user=TDX-CIRCL-UNJAN-SOWET-JABULANI-ND-1
/ip dhcp-server add address-pool=think-hs-pool77 interface=think-hs-bridge lease-time=5m name=think-hs-dhcp-server
/ip dhcp-server network add address=192.168.10.0/24 dns-server=9.9.9.9,149.112.112.112 gateway=192.168.10.1
/ip dhcp-server network add address=192.168.77.0/24 dns-server=9.9.9.9,149.112.112.112 gateway=192.168.77.1

/ip dns set allow-remote-requests=yes cache-max-ttl=10m cache-size=4096KiB max-concurrent-queries=50 max-concurrent-tcp-sessions=50 query-server-timeout=10s servers=9.9.9.9,149.112.112.112 verify-doh-cert=yes

/snmp community add addresses=::/0 authentication-password=thinkmonitor13579 authentication-protocol=SHA1 encryption-password=thinkmonitor13579 encryption-protocol=AES name=THINKSNMPMONITOR security=authorized
/snmp set contact=help@tdx.media enabled=yes location=<EnterPhysicalAddressHere> trap-community=THINKSNMPMONITOR trap-generators=interfaces trap-interfaces=L2TP-THINK-JHBGC-CORE1 trap-version=3
/ip hotspot profile set [ find default=yes ] login-by="" name=default-not-in-use
/ip hotspot profile add login-by=http-chap,http-pap name=think-hs-prof use-radius=yes
/ip hotspot add addresses-per-mac=1 disabled=no idle-timeout=1m interface=think-hs-bridge name=eef41c597160 profile=think-hs-prof
/ip hotspot user profile set [ find default=yes ] add-mac-cookie=no idle-timeout=3m rate-limit=7M/7M session-timeout=5m status-autorefresh=5s
/ip hotspot user set [ find default=yes ] limit-uptime=20m

/ip dns set allow-remote-requests=yes cache-max-ttl=10m cache-size=4096KiB max-concurrent-queries=50 max-concurrent-tcp-sessions=50 query-server-timeout=10s servers=9.9.9.9,149.112.112.112 verify-doh-cert=yes
/radius add address=34.79.51.25 comment=think-hs-radius require-message-auth=no secret=thinkzone service=hotspot timeout=8s
/ip firewall nat add action=masquerade chain=srcnat out-interface=CIRCLETEL-PPPOE
/ip firewall nat add action=masquerade chain=srcnat out-interface=L2TP-THINK-JHBGC-CORE1
/system scheduler add interval=1d name=twurl on-event="/system script run twurl" policy=ftp,reboot,read,write,policy,test,password,sniff,sensitive,romon start-date=2026-01-01 start-time=02:00:00
/system script add dont-require-permissions=no name=twurl owner=admin policy=ftp,reboot,read,write,policy,test,password,sniff,sensitive,romon source=":local checkUrl \"storage.googleapis.com\"\
\n# Test internet connectivity to the required URL\
\n# Check if the ping was successful (received at least one response)\
\n    # --- Commands that run only if the URL is accessible ---\
\n    # These commands remove non-dynamic entries from the lists.\
\n    # Check if 'twurl.rsc' exists before attempting to remove it.\
\n    # This prevents the script from stopping if the file is missing.\
\n    # Wait 3 seconds for the download to complete\
\n    # Wait 5 seconds for the import to finish execution\
\n    # Optional: Log a message if the connection test fails\
\n    :log warning \"Internet connectivity test to \$checkUrl failed. Script not run.\"\
#NOTE THAT ROUTER WILL REQUEST YOU TO PRESS THE PHYSICAL MODE BUTTON OR REBOOT AFTER THIS IS RUN
